name: The Sorrow of the Survivor
overview:
A youth drama set against the backdrop of Korea’s transition from a military regime to a democratic government around the 1988 Seoul Olympics, depicting the encounters and farewells between one young man and two women.

Based on Park Il-moon's novel of the same name.

trailers.title: A story of loss through the 80s and 90s, 'The Sorrow of the Survivor' (1993)
